# Chapter 3 Machine Accounting Functions and Access

Machine Accounting organizes its functions into the following major areas, accessible through the system menu:

## 3.1 Main Menu Options

| Option | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| Open Period | Select a different period to process or start a new period |
| Close Period | Close the current period |
| Audit | Audit Test, Meter Test, Taxable Accrual, Meters On Demand |
| Floor | Machine Maintenance, Maintenance Console, EGM Enable/Disable, Work Order Reprint, Floor Staff, Equipment, Equipment Types, Pagers |
| Configuration | User Management, Change Password, Modify User Tasks, Player ID Locales, Flash Reports, Accounting Calendar, Lease Machines, Progressive Workbook |
| View | User Tasks, Reports |
| Options | System settings, period settings, tax rates |
| Print Setup | Printer and print options for reports |

## 3.2 User Tasks

The User Tasks list provides a task-driven interface for completing audit work. Tasks are organized by category and display completion status. All mandatory tasks must be completed before a period can be closed.

The system supports configuring which tasks appear for each auditor based on their duties.
